name: node-babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs2
title: node-babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs2
summary: node-babel plugin to inject corejs2 polyfill
description:
node-babel plugin to inject corejs2 polyfill
node-babel-polyfills will provide a set of node-babel7 plugins that
enable injecting different polyfills with different strategies in
the compiled code.
.
This package provides babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs2
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs2 because node-babel plugin to inject corejs2 polyfill.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-babel-plugin-polyfill-corejs2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
